ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the tag-to-file-names JSON file will be saved. Requires the file name with extension. 			If this is filled in, the setting below won't have any effect.
ast.target: 标签到文件名JSON文件的保存位置。需要包含扩展名的文件名。如果填写此项，下方的设置将不会生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires the .json extension. 			Only change this setting if you want to change the name of the saved json in the plugin folder.
ast.target: 需要.json扩展名。仅当您想更改插件文件夹中保存的json文件名时才更改此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the metadata JSON file will be saved. Requires the file name with extension. 			If this is filled in, the setting below won't have any effect.
ast.target: 元数据JSON文件的保存位置。需要包含扩展名的文件名。如果填写此项，下方的设置将不会生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Requires the .json extension; leave empty if setting above was changed. 			Only change this setting if you want to change the name of the saved json in the plugin folder.
ast.target: 需要.json扩展名；如果上方设置已更改，请留空。仅当您想更改插件文件夹中保存的json文件名时才更改此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the canvas JSON file will be saved. Requires the file name with extension. 			If this is filled in, the setting below won't have any effect.
ast.target: 画布JSON文件的保存位置。需要包含扩展名的文件名。如果填写此项，下方的设置将不会生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the allExceptMd JSON file will be saved. Requires the file name with extension. 			If this is filled in, the setting below won't have any effect.
ast.target: allExceptMd JSON文件的保存位置。需要包含扩展名的文件名。如果填写此项，下方的设置将不会生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The frequency has to be entered in minutes. Set it to 0 to disable the periodic writing.
ast.target: 频率需以分钟为单位输入。设置为0可禁用定期写入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the JSON files will be written each time Obsidian starts.
ast.target: 如果启用，每次Obsidian启动时都会写入JSON文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only enable this for debugging purposes.
ast.target: 仅在调试目的下启用此项。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File-write path for tags
ast.target: 标签的文件写入路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File name of tag-to-file-names JSON
ast.target: 标签到文件名JSON的文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File-write path for metadata

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File-write path for canvases
ast.target: 画布的文件写入路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File name of canvas JSON
ast.target: 画布JSON的文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File-write path of allExceptMd JSON
ast.target: allExceptMd JSON的文件写入路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File name of allExceptMd JSON
ast.target: allExceptMd JSON的文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Configure frequency for writing the three JSON files
ast.target: 配置写入三个JSON文件的频率

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Write JSON files automatically when Obsidian launches
ast.target: Obsidian启动时自动写入JSON文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show console logs
ast.target: 显示控制台日志

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something went wrong with the backlinks calculation.
ast.target: 反向链接计算出现问题。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Write JSON file with tags and associated file names to disk.
ast.target: 将包含标签和关联文件名的JSON文件写入磁盘。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Write JSON file with metadata to disk.
ast.target: 将包含元数据的JSON文件写入磁盘。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Write JSON file with all folders and non-MD files to disk.
ast.target: 将包含所有文件夹和非MD文件的JSON文件写入磁盘。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Write JSON file with all canvases to disk.
ast.target: 将包含所有画布的JSON文件写入磁盘。
